name: The Journey Of India
overview: A story of India's journey through the past, present, and future. Here, we learn how India has kept up with the modernity while remembering the integral traditions and cultures we possess. Come, join us on this journey as we travel through the story of food, faith, the leaders of the country, and more.

trailers.title: The Journey Of India | English Trailer | Amitabh Bachchan | discovery+
